name: Chicken Breast with Wine Vinegar Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. Generously season the chicken breasts with salt and pepper.
2. Coat the chicken in flour, shaking off any excess.
3. Heat olive oil in a wide skillet (at least 10-inch diameter) over moderately high heat for about 1 minute.
4. Add chicken to the skillet and brown on one side until dark, about 4 minutes.
5. Flip the chicken and brown the other side for another 4 minutes.
6. Remove the chicken from the skillet and set aside.
7. In the same skillet, add thyme, garlic, and white wine vinegar. Stir to loosen any residue in the pan.
8. Add chicken broth and turn the heat to high. Bring the liquid to a rapid boil until reduced to about 1/4 cup.
9. Pour the sauce over the chicken and serve.
